our story

We met during junior year at Michigan — both reaching for the same dog-eared Rushdie novel in Hatcher Library. What started as study sessions turned into late-night walks, turned into chai at midnight, turned into years of showing up for each other. On the rooftop of a crumbling haveli at sunset in Rajasthan, Arjun asked. She said yes before he finished the sentence.

Beautiful things to see while you're here
City Palace

Sprawling courtyards and terraces overlooking Lake Pichola. Allow at least two hours.

Lake Pichola

Sunset boat ride past the Lake Palace. November light is extraordinary.

Jagdish Temple

Seventeenth-century carved marble. Early mornings are quietest.

Ambrai Ghat

Best sunset in Udaipur. Arrive by five for a table at the water's edge.

Thank you from the bottom of our hearts for celebrating with us
